channel.title: Bbc on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Bbc on adoption curve dot net

item.title: iPlaying offline
item.description: Tom Taylor linked to a fascinating BBC Radio 4 In Business programme about why it still matters where we live and work. It’s available for a couple of days still via iPlayer, but if like me you don’t want to be tied to a broadband connection in order to listen to it, you’re a bit stuck because In Business doesn’t have an associated podcast. Stuck, that is, unless you’ve downloaded Paul Battley’s iPlayer Downloader.
